primarySetting: The whole story takes place in ONE cozy child's bedroom at night that is shared with the new baby: the child's bed, the new baby asleep in a small crib by the wall, and the child's soft blanket. Warm bedside lamp. It is the SAME night bedroom on every page — never a clinic, never daylight, never another room, never outdoors.
forbiddenDrift: more than one Dini / duplicate or cloned dragon
an empty crib (the new baby is always asleep in it)
redesigning the bedroom set between pages
transitionRules: Stay in the SAME night bedroom on every page — camera may move, the room must not redesign.
Never cut to a clinic, a daytime room, another room, or outdoors.
The blanket is the only object whose state changes; the bed and the baby's crib stay the same.

scenes.label: The shared night bedroom
scenes.description: One cozy child's bedroom at night shared with the new baby — the child's bed, the new baby asleep in a small crib by the wall, warm bedside lamp. The single set for the whole book.

recurringObjects.label: the child's bed
recurringObjects.identity: The SAME child's bed every page — same headboard and the same soft blanket. A child's bed, never a crib or hospital bed.
forbiddenDrift: a crib or hospital bed for the child

stateTimeline.state: the child lies in bed, tucked in by a parent
the child sleeps in the same bed, blanket with a soft open gap near the hand

recurringObjects.label: the new baby's crib
recurringObjects.identity: The SAME small wooden crib standing by the wall, with the new baby asleep inside it. The same crib and the same one sleeping baby every page.
forbiddenDrift: a second baby or second crib
the crib moved to a different wall
a cradle or hospital bassinet instead of the crib

stateTimeline.state: the new baby asleep in the crib, just tucked in by the parent
the new baby sighs softly in sleep in the same crib

recurringObjects.label: the child's blanket
recurringObjects.identity: The SAME single soft blanket on the child's bed — the story's key object. Same blanket throughout; only how it is folded changes.
forbiddenDrift: a different blanket pattern or color
a hospital sheet instead of the soft blanket

stateTimeline.state: pulled up to the child's chin
over-folded by Dini's tail — too many folds, one of the child's knees trapped
bundled too tightly around the child (safe but unable to move)
the child opens a small gap in one fold near the hand
a small open gap stays near the hand; the child's hand slips through to touch the teddy
a soft visible gap near the hand remains as the child sleeps

forbiddenDrift: any clinic, hospital, or medical setting
daylight or a bright daytime room
any room other than this one shared night bedroom
the baby missing from the crib
more than one dragon, child, or baby
